# coolify_backup_executions (Data Source)

Lists all executions for a database backup.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_backup_executions" "db_backup" {
  database_uuid = "your-database-uuid"
  backup_uuid   = "your-backup-uuid"
}

output "backup_execution_statuses" {
  value = [for e in data.coolify_backup_executions.db_backup.executions : e.status]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `backup_uuid` (String) The UUID of the backup configuration.
- `database_uuid` (String) The UUID of the database.

### Read-Only

- `executions` (Attributes List) The list of backup executions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--executions))

<a id="nestedatt--executions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `executions`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `size` (Number) The size of the backup in bytes.
- `status` (String) The status of the execution.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the execution.
